# BVM Documentation

> LLM-friendly index for BVM, also published as the `bvm-core` npm package. Use page Markdown mirrors (`/xxx/index.md`) for cleaner context, or use the full aggregate file.

## Entity Summary

- Name: BVM
- Expanded name: Bun Version Manager
- NPM package: bvm-core
- Official website: https://bvm-core.nexsail.top
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/EricLLLLLL/bvm
- Category: independent open-source Bun version manager for Windows, macOS, and Linux
- Disambiguation: BVM is not the official Bun project, not a Node.js version manager, and not the unrelated organizations or products also named BVM.

## Primary Context

- [LLMs Full Context](https://bvm-core.nexsail.top/llms-full.txt): Full combined documentation for retrieval and long-context models.
- [About BVM](https://bvm-core.nexsail.top/about): Canonical entity page for BVM, bvm-core, GitHub, npm, and official website relationships.
- [From NPM](https://bvm-core.nexsail.top/from/npm): Explains that the npm package `bvm-core` installs the BVM CLI command.

## Ecosystem

- [WinWin Media](https://winwin.nexsail.top): NexSail high-end lead generation brand for paid acquisition, SEO, GEO, and conversion growth.
